generated_queries: site:congress.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND ("draft bill" OR "enacted law") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:ftc.gov "e-commerce regulation" OR "social commerce" AND "regulatory guidance" AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:justice.gov "data localization" AND ("court ruling" OR "hearing") AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:whitehouse.gov "children safety" OR "minor protection" AND "executive order" AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]
site:ftc.gov OR site:fcc.gov "e-commerce regulation" OR "social commerce" AND "recent developments" AND date:[2023-07-01 TO 2023-10-01]

signals.title: Social Security Child Protection Act of 2025
signals.summary: This act mandates the issuance of a new Social Security number to children under 14 if their original number's confidentiality is compromised. It aims to enhance child safety by protecting their identity.
key_provisions: Mandates issuance of a new Social Security number for compromised numbers
Requires evidence under penalty of perjury for new number issuance

signals.title: Children's Online Privacy Protection Enhancement Act
signals.summary: This act seeks to amend the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998 to strengthen online safety measures for minors, reflecting the need for updated protections in the digital age.
key_provisions: Amends the Children's Online Privacy Protection Act of 1998
Strengthens online safety measures for minors

signals.title: Child Safety and Well-Being Act of 2024
signals.summary: This act proposes the establishment of an independent Children's Commission to oversee and promote child safety and well-being, aiming to institutionalize child protection efforts.
key_provisions: Establishes an independent Children's Commission
Defines duties and powers of the Commission

signals.title: Child Marriage Prevention Act of 2024
signals.summary: This act aims to comprehensively combat child marriage in the United States by outlining specific measures and definitions to prevent such practices.
key_provisions: Combats child marriage in the United States
Outlines specific measures and definitions

signals.title: Baby Food Safety Act of 2023
signals.summary: This act seeks to amend the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act to establish limits on toxic elements in infant and toddler food, ensuring the safety and health of young children.
key_provisions: Establishes limits on toxic elements in baby food
Amends the Federal Food, Drug, and Cosmetic Act

signals.title: The INFORM Consumers Act
signals.summary: This act mandates online marketplaces to collect, verify, and disclose information about high-volume third-party sellers to enhance transaction transparency and protect consumers.
key_provisions: Requires information collection and verification of sellers
Mandates consumer disclosure of seller information
Establishes a reporting mechanism for suspicious activities

signals.title: FTC's Initiative to Modernize Digital Advertising Guidance
signals.summary: The FTC seeks public input to update its guidance on digital advertising to address evolving practices and combat deceptive tactics, focusing on areas like social media and mobile devices.
key_provisions: Addresses sponsored content on social media
Focuses on advertising in games and virtual reality
Targets dark patterns and mobile device disclosures

signals.title: Executive Order 14117: Preventing Access to Americans’ Sensitive Data by Countries of Concern
signals.summary: This executive order prohibits the transfer of Americans' sensitive data to certain foreign countries, aiming to protect national security by regulating data access.
key_provisions: Prohibits data transfer to countries of concern
Mandates DOJ to establish regulations preventing data access

signals.title: DOJ's Final Rule Implementing Executive Order 14117
signals.summary: This rule establishes a regulatory framework to enforce prohibitions on data transfer to foreign adversaries, clarifying that it does not impose general data localization requirements.
key_provisions: Enforces prohibitions on data transfer to foreign adversaries
Clarifies no general data localization requirements

signals.title: Court Ruling in TikTok, et al. v. Garland
signals.summary: The court upheld measures to prevent the Chinese government from accessing sensitive information of American users through TikTok, affirming the constitutionality of national security actions.
key_provisions: Prevents Chinese government access to TikTok user data
Affirms constitutionality of national security measures
